node.statement: FIB-FUSION-001: The finite skeletal Fibonacci label set has labels 1 and tau with multiplicity-free fusion rules 1⊗1=1, 1⊗tau=tau, tau⊗1=tau, and tau⊗tau=1⊕tau. Lean formalises the fusionMultiplicity table and proves the stated cases, multiplicity-free bound, and tau⊗tau total multiplicity two.
